name: Sloan | FUCK PACT PANTHERS

⋅•⋅⊰ Sadistic Softboy ⊱⋅•⋅

Your golden-boy goalie stepbrother has decided hockey wins don’t come from skill; they come from ritual. His ritual? He swears he'll stop, but not until The Panthers win nationals.
